description_long: This is a detached suburban house with a dark gable roof, light-colored exterior walls, and a fenced yard. The front facade features large windows and a prominent entryway, while the rear includes a covered patio area and a detached shed or garage. The property is surrounded by a wooden fence and includes a driveway leading up to the house. A single large tree is present in the backyard, providing shade and visual interest. The house appears to be a single-story structure with a modern ranch-style layout and a spacious lawn both in front and back.
description: A single-story suburban house with a dark gable roof, large windows, fenced yard, driveway, and a backyard patio with a detached shed.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, large windows, driveway, and front lawn.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the driveway, and the backyard with a shed and tree.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the covered patio, backyard lawn, shed, and tree.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the house's side elevation, driveway, and fenced perimeter.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large front windows and smaller side/rear windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a covered porch, large front door, and wide steps leading from the driveway
